# Vendored Source Manifest

This folder contains selected upstream skill/workflow material for `pptx-writer`.

| Local path | Upstream | Commit | Selection |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `pptx-from-layouts` | `https://github.com/tristan-mcinnis/pptx-from-layouts-skill` | `3be00fbc81d7ceba90d79556f47680a6914fa47f` | `.claude/skills/pptx-from-layouts` |
| `minimax-pptx-generator` | `https://github.com/MiniMax-AI/skills` | `60aaae52bb2af8162732751a4332f62a5fef518b` | `skills/pptx-generator` |
| `ppt-master` | `https://github.com/hugohe3/ppt-master` | `673ba70c1bec1d4a6131ead5a8107d5ccb2f598a` | `skills/ppt-master` core docs/scripts; bulky example templates omitted |

Anthropic official `pptx` skill patterns are re-expressed in `../references/general-create-edit.md` and `../references/quality-gates.md`; the proprietary upstream file is not copied into `vendor/`.
